about.current_phase: At this stage, the page focuses on a stable foundation. The full menu, ordering and admin functionality arrives through the next modules.
about.description: We bake in downtown Budapest, in small quantities, with quality ingredients and slow processes.
about.philosophy: Our philosophy in short: Starter. Time. Patience. This shapes the dough texture, the aroma and the everyday quality.
about.title: Hajnalhéj: a modern bakery with classic foundations.

conversion_analytics.description: Conversion rates, time-series trends, hero variant comparison and funnel drop-off points.

dashboard.next_steps_description: In the next phase, real reports, order metrics, and navigational targets of CRUD modules will be added here.
fields.name: full name
hero_section.bakes_in_small_batches: Hajnalhéj bakes in small batches week after week to ensure it's crispy, warm, and real every morning.
hero_section.freshly_baked_breads: Freshly baked breads, slowly rising, at dawn.
hero_section.philosophy_description: Every product is made with hours of fermentation, so the flavor, texture and aroma stay memorable.
home.bestseller_02_note: Soft texture, golden crust, made for festive mornings.
home.bestseller_03_note: With extra virgin olive oil and sea salt flakes.
home.bestsellers_description: The full selection changes dynamically, but these three items return almost every week.
home.faq_01_answer: Until the stock shown in the weekly menu runs out, usually until the evening before pickup day.
home.faq_01_question: How long can I order for the current week?
home.faq_02_answer: It is strongly recommended for fast and convenient repeat orders, but the flow can also be started as a guest.
home.faq_02_question: Do I need an account to order?
home.faq_03_answer: We allow a short grace period during opening hours, but it is best to let us know in advance.
home.faq_03_question: What happens if I miss my pickup slot?
home.final_description: Join our returning customers and order from the weekly selection in 1 minute.
home.hero_title_01: Premium artisanal baked goods, with fast and predictable delivery.
home.hero_title_02: Premium artisanal baked goods by pre-order.
home.hero_title_03: Order with a few clicks and receive your freshly baked favorites at a specific time slot.
home.hero_title_04: Slow proofing, small batch baking, precise delivery. At Hajnalhéj, quality is not a compromise, but a system.
home.step_01_text: Every week we publish a fresh selection with clear stock limits.
home.step_02_text: After registration, checkout is fast and your favorite details stay saved.
home.step_03_text: Your order waits prepared in your selected time slot, without stress.
home.steps_description: The flow is designed to give you consistently high quality with minimal effort.
home.testimonial_01_quote: "The sourdough loaf delivers the same high standard every week. Rarely this consistent."
home.testimonial_02_quote: "Ordering and pickup are so smooth that it fits into a weekday morning."
home.testimonial_03_quote: "The pastries taste genuinely premium, nothing like mass production."
home.testimonials_title: Quality is not a promise, it is routine
home.trust_pillar_03: Faster pickup by pre-order, without the queue
home.urgency_description: Quantities are limited and pickup is time-slot based. The most popular items usually sell out within 24-48 hours.
home.urgency_title: Reserve ahead so your favorite is still available.
home.why_description: Every item is prepared so flavor, texture and freshness peak at the moment of pickup.
